While climbing the Spire, you encounter another climber.

[red]"{TargetName}... my nemesis..! I will kill you..!"[/red]

This poor, controlled climber looks dangerous to touch. And doesn't it sound like demonic laughter is coming from somewhere? A fight to the death is about to begin...

[red]"Running away, coward?!"[/red]

The Ironclad swings his club at you as you flee!

Your backside hurts...
The Ironclad staggers back, the demonic laughter fading into the walls.
